charge, in a move aimed at reducing extra costs for passengers. Under the new rules, passengers travelling on the same PNR, typically families or groups, must be seated together, preferably in adjacent seats. The directive comes after widespread complaints over airlines charging for seat selection and separating passengers unless additional fees were paid. Authorities say the move is part of a broader push to improve transparency, passenger rights, and overall travel Taj Mahal in controversial US deportation ad sparks debate over migrant exit policy","abstract":"The US Department of Homeland Security has rolled out a bold yet controversial plan offering illegal immigrants a free flight and 2,600 dollars to leave the country voluntarily. Branded as “Project Homecoming,” the scheme has sparked global attention, especially after the use of the Taj Mahal in its campaign. The idea is to cut deportation costs and provide a smoother exit process through a dedicated app. However, social media backlash has been swift, with users questioning the logic and fairness of the move. From India’s perspective, the development is crucial, given the large number of Indians living in the US. The policy raises larger questions about migration, incentives, and how nations manage complex global movement of people.","readTimeMin":0,"url":"https://www.msn.com/en-in/video/news/india-on-target-taj-mahal-in-controversial-us-deportation-ad-sparks-debate-over-migrant-exit-policy/vi-AA1YTNkZ","locale":"en-in","isLocalContent":false,"publishedDateTime":"2026-03-18T15:40:20Z","height":304.0,"wpoId":14,"isFeatured":false,"images":[{"width":1600,"height":900,"url":"https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.31c48bf5928918c327dbe0fae64e84a3&pid=Wdp","attribution":"","title":"India On Target? Culture erased’ claim sparks row over Hindu temple in Dallas Fort, targets Indian community online","abstract":"The construction of a new Hindu temple in Plano has sparked a heated cultural debate in the United States, reflecting rising tensions around identity and immigration. Located in the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex, the upcoming Sri Ganesha Temple has drawn criticism online, with viral posts on X (formerly Twitter) claiming rapid expansion of Hindu institutions in the area. The reaction has ranged from concern to outright hostility, with some targeting Hindu beliefs and the Indian diaspora. Experts point out that such responses are often amplified by social media ecosystems. Research by the Network Contagion Research Institute warns of increasing digital targeting of communities. As Indian-origin populations grow in cities like Plano, the debate highlights a broader challenge—balancing cultural diversity with social cohesion in an increasingly polarised world.","readTimeMin":0,"url":"https://www.msn.com/en-in/news/india/culture-erased-claim-sparks-row-over-hindu-temple-in-dallas-fort-targets-indian-community-online/vi-AA1YQcvs","locale":"en-in","isLocalContent":false,"publishedDateTime":"2026-03-17T22:00:11Z","height":304.0,"wpoId":15,"isFeatured":false,"images":[{"width":1920,"height":1080,"url":"https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.c0a2c1b0a59599fd882dc84196ee8e01&pid=Wdp","attribution":"","title":"‘Culture sends more warships to escort ships through battle-hit Strait of Hormuz","abstract":"Amid rising instability in West Asia, India has ramped up its naval presence in the Gulf of Oman to protect its fuel lifelines passing through the Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil artery. With tensions surging after US and Israeli strikes on Iran, shipping in the region has been severely disrupted. Government sources say New Delhi is coordinating to ensure safe transit for Indian-flagged vessels, even as several ships remain stranded near the chokepoint. The Indian Navy has increased deployments to up to seven warships, actively escorting tankers and monitoring high-risk zones. The move underscores India’s urgent push to secure energy routes and protect its maritime interests.","readTimeMin":0,"url":"https://www.msn.com/en-in/news/world/india-sends-more-warships-to-escort-ships-through-battle-hit-strait-of-hormuz/vi-AA1YXH9W","locale":"en-in","isLocalContent":false,"publishedDateTime":"2026-03-19T10:15:55Z","height":304.0,"wpoId":17,"isFeatured":false,"images":[{"width":1920,"height":1080,"url":"https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.21b33b1f63b811fb8d941ad8bef0d64c&pid=Wdp","attribution":"","title":"India See all available plans in your area.

Simpler living starts with reliable home protection.

With American Water Resources, an Oncourse Company, simpler living isn't just a promise - it's how we're built.

Trusted by millions
1.9 million homes protected - saving $100M+ in repair costs yearly.

Decades of Experience
30+ years of protecting homes with licensed, local experts.

Hassle-Free Claims
One call and we handle the rest – scheduling, permits, inspections and more.

Flexible Coverage
Month-to-month protection with no long-term contracts. Cancel anytime.

Guaranteed Repairs
Covered repairs backed by a 1-year guarantee.

Proven Partnerships
The chosen partner of 25+ utilities and municipalities nationwide.

Always-On Support
24/7/365 live phone support with real people, always ready to help.

Fast Local Help
Support when you need it most - relief until repairs are complete.

Protecting your money, time and peace of mind.

Get started in minutes with easy online enrollment.

We're a trusted partner for utilities and municipalities nationwide.

Our partnerships help homeowners save more - with protection supported by their local providers.

See if you're in a partner region.

Proof that home protection pays off.

Here’s what real customers have to say about their experience with us.

Our sewer line backed up and we feared family from out of town would have to leave.  A knowledgeable technician arrived in 24 hours on Christmas Day and resolved the problem.

Lynn G.

We were grateful for the service you provided us recently on a bitterly cold day. We got assistance with our water/sewer line backup in 30 minutes after after we filed a claim. Thank you for your speedy service.

Rachel S.

I have sewer and water line protection and they were lifesavers when my sewer line clogged. What would have cost $500+ to fix was fully covered. And the plumber arrived in 2 hours! Highly recommend

Kierra B.

Oncourse Home Solutions, LLC is the provider and obligor of protection programs administered by American Water Resources, LLC (AWR). In Florida, Oncourse Home Solutions of Florida, LLC is the provider and obligor of protection programs administered by AWR. The company has been providing protection contracts for decades with more than 9 out of 10 customers satisfied and an A Rating from the Better Business Bureau. American Water Resources also provides its protection contracts to homeowners through municipal partnerships with the New York City Department of Environmental Protection, Orlando Utilities Commission, and others. American Water Resources is not owned by American Water but uses the trademark “American Water Resources” under license from American Water. As such, AWR’s optional programs are not provided or guaranteed by American Water or its affiliates, and any changes in AWR’s prices are not determined or controlled by American Water or its affiliates. American Water Resources conducts business in California as American Water Resources Insurance Services and administers home protection contracts, provided by Virginia Surety Company, Inc., CA Lic. No. 0F65279. In Virginia, American Water Resources administers insurance policies, underwritten by Virginia Surety Company, Inc., VA Lic. No. 109751. New Jersey Residents: The product being offered is a service contract and is separate and distinct from any product or service warranty which may be provided by the home builder or manufacturer.

{"addressValidation":{"modalTitle":"","message":"

Please check your address, our system indicates that this is not a valid service address.

If you are continuing to experience issues, please call 1-855-800-5195 to speak to a customer service representative.

","buttonText":"Continue","buttonSuccessText":""},"eligibility":{"10":{"title":"","message":"

There was a problem verifying your customer information.

Please try again or contact Customer Service at 1-855-800-5195 if you are continuing to experience issues.

","buttonText":"Continue","reasons":{"collision":{"title":"","message":"

We are facing difficulties with your account at this time, please call 855-800-5195 for assistance.

","buttonText":"Go back"}}},"11":{"title":"","message":"

Important Information

We have updated the products in your cart based on your location.

","buttonText":"Continue"},"12":{"title":"","message":"

There was a problem creating your customer account.

Please try again or contact Customer Service at 1-855-800-5195 if you are continuing to experience issues.

","buttonText":"Continue"},"13":{"title":"","message":"

We have identified that you already have one of the selected plans active for your property. The plan(s) with overlapping coverage with your current enrollment will be excluded from your cart:

    {products}
","buttonText":"Continue"},"14":{"title":"","message":"

We have identified that you already have the active plan(s) for your property that is overlapping with the product(s) in your cart. Please call 855-800-5195 if you want to upgrade your enrollment. The plan(s) with overlapping coverage with your current enrollment will be excluded from your cart:

    {products}
","buttonText":"Continue"},"15":{"title":"","message":"

Great news! We have bundled the plans that you selected with your current enrollment to help you save. The following enrollments will be replaced by the new bundled coverage:

    {products}
","buttonText":"Continue"},"16":{"title":"","message":"

We have identified that you already have one of the selected plans active for your property. The plan(s) with overlapping coverage with your current enrollment will be excluded from your cart:

    {products}
","buttonText":"Continue"},"17":{"title":"","message":"

We encountered an issue processing your order's tax information.

Please review your address information to ensure they are accurate.

If you are continuing to experience issues, please call 1-855-800-5195 to speak to a customer service representative.

","buttonText":"Continue"},"23":{"title":"","message":"Unfortunately, this plan cannot be added to the cart as it exceeds the allowed limit. The maximum coverage limit for Surge Protection is $10,000.","buttonText":"Back"},"02":{"title":"","message":"

This product has already been added to your cart or you are currently protected with a similar product.

If you wish to upgrade or change your protection coverage, please contact Customer Service at 1-855-800-5195.

","buttonText":"Continue"},"03":{"title":"","message":"

This product has already been added to your cart.

","buttonText":"Continue"},"04":{"title":"","message":"

We are sorry, we do not currently offer this service in your location.

","buttonText":"Continue"},"05":{"title":"","message":"

We have identified that the product you have chosen overlaps with the product(s) in your cart. Please, remove overlapping products in your cart in case you want to continue the enrollment with the current plan.

    {products}
","buttonText":"Continue"},"06":{"title":"","message":"

This program is included in a bundle that has already been added to your cart.

","buttonText":"Continue"},"07":{"title":"","message":"

Great news! We have bundled the plans that you selected with your current enrollment to help you save. The following enrollments will be replaced by the new bundled coverage:

    {products}
","buttonText":"Continue"},"08":{"title":"","message":"

There was a problem retrieving or updating your cart details.

Please try again or contact Customer Service at 1-855-800-5195 if you are continuing to experience issues.

","buttonText":"Continue"},"00":{"title":"","message":"

This product could not be added to your cart.

","buttonText":"Continue"},"INCOMPATIBLE_BILL_PRESENTER":{"title":"","message":"

Unfortunately, we could not process your enrollment. Please contact us at 855-800-5195 for assistance. Thank you.

","buttonText":"Go Back"},"EXISTING_PRODUCT_NO_LONGER_AVAILABLE_ONLINE":{"title":"","message":"Unfortunately, we could not process your enrollment. Please contact us at {PHONE_NUMBER} for assistance. Thank you.","buttonText":"Go Back"}},"network":{"modalTitle":"","message":"

Oops! Something went wrong. We could not process your request.

Please go back and try again.

If you are continuing to experience issues, please call 1-855-800-5195 to speak to a customer service representative.

","buttonText":"Go Back","buttonSuccessText":""},"placeOrder":{"18":{"title":"","message":"

Unfortunately, we could not process your order.

Please call 1-855-800-5195 to speak to a customer service representative to assist you.

","buttonText":"Go Back"},"19":{"title":"","message":"

Unfortunately, we could not confirm the provided account number with your utility provider.

Please call 1-855-800-5195 to speak to a customer service representative to assist you.

","buttonText":"Go Back"},"20":{"title":"","message":"

Please checkout your utility products separately from products being billed directly from American Water Resources.

Sorry for the temporary inconvenience.

","buttonText":"Go Back"}},"utilityNumberValidation":{"modalTitle":"","message":"

Please check your utility number.

If you are continuing to experience issues, please call 1-855-800-5195 to speak to a customer service representative.

","buttonText":"Continue","buttonSuccessText":""},"termsAndConditions":{"modalTitle":"","message":"

Sorry, we could not find the Terms & Condition document for this product.

Please contact Customer Service at 1-855-800-5195 for assistance.

","buttonText":"Close","buttonSuccessText":""},"zipCodeValidation":{"modalTitle":"","message":"

American Water Resources isn't available in your area yet.

","buttonText":"Close","buttonSuccessText":""},"noProspectCustomer":{"modalTitle":"","message":"

We couldn't find a profile with matching data. Please check your entry and try again. If the issue persists, reach us at 1-855-800-5195

","buttonText":"Close","buttonSuccessText":""},"promoCodeError":{"PC01":{"title":"","message":"

Oops! Your promo code is invalid. Please check the code and try again. If you need assistance, please get in touch with our support center at {PHONE_NUMBER}.

","buttonText":"Back"},"PC02":{"title":"","message":"

Oops! Seems you already have another promo code applied. If you have any questions, please contact us by calling {PHONE_NUMBER}.

","buttonText":"Back"},"PC03":{"title":"","message":"

Oops! Your promo code could not be applied. If you need assistance, please get in touch with our support center at {PHONE_NUMBER}.

","buttonText":"Back"}},"daeCampaignZipCodeValidation":{"modalTitle":"","message":"

We're sorry! This promotion is not available in your area.

","buttonText":"Close","buttonSuccessText":""},"dae":{"promoCodeApplied":{"modalTitle":"Promo code already applied","message":"

It looks like you already have a discounted product or an applied promo code in your cart. Only one promo code can be used during checkout. You can remove the existing promo code and get this product discounted on the Payment page by applying promo code: {DAE_NOTICE_CODE}.

","buttonText":"Back","buttonSuccessText":"Continue to Checkout"}}}

16:T613,

Oncourse Home Solutions, LLC is the provider and obligor of protection programs administered by American Water Resources, LLC (AWR). In Florida, Oncourse Home Solutions of Florida, LLC is the provider and obligor of protection programs administered by AWR. The company has been providing protection contracts for decades with more than 9 out of 10 customers satisfied and an A Rating from the Better Business Bureau. American Water Resources also provides its protection contracts to homeowners through municipal partnerships with the New York City Department of Environmental Protection, Orlando Utilities Commission, and others. American Water Resources is not owned by American Water but uses the trademark “American Water Resources” under license from American Water. As such, AWR’s optional programs are not provided or guaranteed by American Water or its affiliates, and any changes in AWR’s prices are not determined or controlled by American Water or its affiliates. American Water Resources conducts business in California as American Water Resources Insurance Services and administers home protection contracts, provided by Virginia Surety Company, Inc., CA Lic. No. 0F65279. In Virginia, American Water Resources administers insurance policies, underwritten by Virginia Surety Company, Inc., VA Lic. No. 109751. New Jersey Residents: The product being offered is a service contract and is separate and distinct from any product or service warranty which may be provided by the home builder or manufacturer.

In Florida, Oncourse Home Solutions of Florida, LLC is the provider and obligor of protection programs administered by AWR. The company has been providing protection contracts for decades with more than 9 out of 10 customers satisfied and an A Rating from the Better Business Bureau. American Water Resources also provides its protection contracts to homeowners through municipal partnerships with the New York City Department of Environmental Protection, Orlando Utilities Commission, and others. American Water Resources is not owned by American Water but uses the trademark “American Water Resources” under license from American Water. As such, AWR’s optional programs are not provided or guaranteed by American Water or its affiliates, and any changes in AWR’s prices are not determined or controlled by American Water or its affiliates. American Water Resources conducts business in California as American Water Resources Insurance Services and administers home protection contracts, provided by Virginia Surety Company, Inc., CA Lic. No. 0F65279. In Virginia, American Water Resources administers insurance policies, underwritten by Virginia Surety Company, Inc., VA Lic. No. 109751. New Jersey Residents: The product being offered is a service contract and is separate and distinct from any product or service warranty which may be provided by the home builder or manufacturer.

Oncourse Home Solutions, LLC is the provider and obligor of protection programs administered by American Water Resources, LLC (AWR). In Florida, Oncourse Home Solutions of Florida, LLC is the provider and obligor of protection programs administered by AWR. The company has been providing protection contracts for decades with more than 9 out of 10 customers satisfied and an A Rating from the Better Business Bureau. American Water Resources also provides its protection contracts to homeowners through municipal partnerships with the New York City Department of Environmental Protection, Orlando Utilities Commission, and others. American Water Resources is not owned by American Water but uses the trademark “American Water Resources” under license from American Water. As such, AWR’s optional programs are not provided or guaranteed by American Water or its affiliates, and any changes in AWR’s prices are not determined or controlled by American Water or its affiliates. American Water Resources conducts business in California as American Water Resources Insurance Services and administers home protection contracts, provided by Virginia Surety Company, Inc., CA Lic.
